name: Tooltip
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Tooltip wrapper composed from the local Base UI Tooltip primitive, shadcn slot classes, local class canonicalization, deterministic delay and placement attributes, arrow styling, and local static examples.

registry.reason: shadcn Tooltip composes the local Base UI Tooltip primitive.
shadcn Tooltip examples compose local Button markup for trigger demos.
shadcn Tooltip keyboard example composes the local Kbd item.
shadcn Tooltip uses the local class composition helper.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native wrapper and examples.
Provides Effect Schema options used by the local wrapper.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin Base UI React primitive is replaced by the local Foldkit Base UI Tooltip implementation.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.
Origin RTL example dependency is replaced by local deterministic RTL labels in installable examples.
Origin icon dependency is replaced by local deterministic text/icon markup in installable examples.

examples.title: TooltipDemo
examples.description: Basic Tooltip with local Button trigger and default top content placement.
examples.distinguishes: Basic Tooltip with local Button trigger and default top content placement.

examples.title: TooltipDisabled
examples.description: Tooltip over a disabled local Button trigger shell.
examples.distinguishes: Tooltip over a disabled local Button trigger shell.

examples.title: TooltipKeyboard
examples.description: Tooltip with a local icon shell and local Kbd composition.
examples.distinguishes: Tooltip with a local icon shell and local Kbd composition.

examples.title: TooltipRtl
examples.description: RTL Tooltip examples with physical and logical side attributes.
examples.distinguishes: RTL Tooltip examples with physical and logical side attributes.

examples.title: TooltipSides
examples.description: Tooltip examples rendered across the supported physical sides.
examples.distinguishes: Tooltip examples rendered across the supported physical sides.

deviations.summary: The shadcn wrapper composes local Tooltip attributes instead of importing upstream Base UI React primitives.
deviations.rationale: Installable Foldkit source must not import React or upstream Base UI runtime packages.

deviations.summary: Examples use local Button, Kbd, deterministic RTL labels, and local icon shells instead of unavailable origin app dependencies.
deviations.rationale: The Tooltip slice preserves the relevant DOM, class, ARIA, and visual contracts without adding React, lucide-react, or app-local language selector runtime dependencies.

deviations.summary: Delay and provider grouping are exposed as deterministic attributes and consumer-owned open-change facts.
deviations.rationale: Tooltip remains a pure Foldkit render helper and does not hide timers in installable view code.

deviations.summary: Positioner and content expose side, align, offset, collision, viewport, and arrow attributes without runtime DOM measurement or collision flipping.
deviations.rationale: Measured collision behavior belongs behind a shared measurement service, not inside the shadcn render helper.

distinguishes: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Tooltip wrapper composed from the local Base UI Tooltip primitive, shadcn slot classes, local class canonicalization, deterministic delay and placement attributes, arrow styling, and local static examples.
